$comment: Host-feature support matrix per cloud agent — the pivot-path JSON sidecar from TASKS.md `cloud-agent-config-and-host-feature-matrix-audit`. Canonical source for the (agent × host-feature) classification that the AGENTS.md § "Agent support matrix" table renders for humans. `cloud` / `local` mirror the table's Cloud / Local columns; `briefDelivery` / `modelFlag` mirror `AGENT_MATRIX` in cloud-agent-config.mjs so the audit can cross-check schema-doc vs implementation in both directions. Originally specced for novel/cross-repo-runner/src/supported-agents.json; that directory was deleted in phase-7b so this lives adjacent to its single source of truth in scripts/lib/.
